zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix von Loccum Hallermund於1147年出生在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 尼波-維洛姆時，她的父親Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund32歲，母親Beatrix von Rheineck27歲。她和Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburg至少有4個兒子。她去世於1194年在德國尼德薩辛歐登伯格享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix von Loccum Hallermund was born in 1147, in Loccum, Nienburg, Lower Saxony, Germany, her father, Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund, was 32 and her mother, Beatrix von Rheineck, was 27. She had at least 4 sons with Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburg. She died in 1194, in Oldenburg, Lower Saxony, Germany, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix von Loccum Hallermund est née en 1147, à Loccum, Landkreis Nienburg-Weser, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Beatrix von Rheineck, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils avec Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburg. Elle est décédée en 1194, à Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.Loccum, Stolzenau, Hannover, Preußen, Du: Loccum, Kreis Stolzenau, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix von Loccum Hallermund 1147 in Loccum, Landkreis Nienburg-Weser, Niedersachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund 32 und ihre Mutter Beatrix von Rheineck 27. Sie hatte mit Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburg mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1194 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix von Loccum Hallermund è nata il nel 1147 nel Loccum, Landkreis Nienburg-Weser, Niedersachsen, Germania, sua padre, Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Beatrix von Rheineck, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli con Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburg. Morì nel 1194, nel Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Germania, all'età di 47 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Loccum Hallermund(이)가 1147년 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 니버그-w세르 록c에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix von Rheineck(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburg(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1194년 독일 니더작센 덴버그에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Loccum, Stolzenau, Hannover, Preußen, Du: локкум, крис столзенау, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix von Loccum Hallermund родилась в 1147 г. в местности локкум, ландкрис ниенбург-весир, ниедирсачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrix von Rheineck, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына от Graf Heinrich II von Oldenburg. Она умерла в 1194 г. в местности олденбург, ниедирсачсен, Германия в возрасте 47 лет.
